entries.title: Scan release updates more easily
entries.description: Changelog updates are now clearer and easier to browse.

entries.title: Upload purchase order documents
entries.description: Attach purchase order documents directly to jobs for convenient access.

entries.title: See accurate working-day dates
entries.description: Job slots and schedule windows now show their first and last working days, avoiding misleading weekend and end dates.

entries.title: Open the assistant from the sidebar
entries.description: The assistant is now easier to find and access from the main sidebar.

entries.title: Connect with us on Facebook
entries.description: Use the new Facebook links to visit Jedidiah on social media.

entries.title: View custom line items with assemblies
entries.description: Custom line items now appear alongside assemblies so job details are more complete.

entries.title: See accurate working-day dates
entries.description: Job slots and schedule windows now show their first and last working days, avoiding misleading weekend and end dates.
